sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Fix KeyError: 'prompt_tokens' crash when streaming requests are aborted by scheduler (e.g., due to --max-queued-requests limit being reached).
When scheduler aborts a streaming request, _handle_abort_req in tokenizer_manager.py generates meta_info without prompt_tokens field. The streamin

sglang.title: [HiCache] Enable spec v2 + decode KV cache offloading compatibility
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix GPU memory leak in _release_finished_req() when spec v2 and decode KV cache offloading are both enabled. Over-allocated draft token slots ([kv_committed_len:kv_allocated_len]) were never freed after request completion.
Add overallocation cleanup mirroring the existing pattern in release

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix MoRI EP warmup hang by restoring deepep_mode=normal default
sglang.author: bingxche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #19216 removed the self.deepep_mode = "normal" auto-setting for MoRI EP, leaving it as "auto". This causes MoRI EP to initialize in EpMode.LOW_LATENCY mode, which hangs during warmup on MI325X 8-GPU configurations.https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/22471492647/job/65100

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Anthropic API base64 image handling in Messages endpoint
vllm.author: voipmonitor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fix broken image/vision support in the Anthropic Messages API adapter (/v1/messages). Two bugs are addressed:
Bug 1: Base64 images in direct content blocks rejected with 400
The _convert_anthropic_to_openai_request method placed raw base64 data directly as the image_url.url value. vLLM's med

vllm.title: Add TMA support to fused_moe_lora kernel
vllm.author: gnovack
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Adds support for loading A and B matrices from TMA descriptors in the existing fused_moe_lora kernel.
Implementation Details

Adds a supports_tma function to conditionally enable TMA based on compute capability
Reads LoRA A and B weights using TMA in MoE LoRA shrink and expand, respectively.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model] Fix Qwen3.5/Qwen3Next ignoring --dtype flag on older GPUs
vllm.author: lailoo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Bug: Qwen3.5 and Qwen3Next models ignore --dtype float16, creating bfloat16 parameters that crash on GPUs without bfloat16 support (e.g. 2080 Ti)
Root cause: config.dtype (HuggingFace PretrainedConfig.dtype) returns the model's original torch_dtype from config.json (bfloat16), ignoring the

vllm.title: Fix typo: implictly -> implicitly in isaac.py docstring
vllm.author: lin-shh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes a minor typo in the docstring of vllm/model_executor/models/isaac.py:
- Edge length of square patches; implictly controls resize grid granularity.
+ Edge length of square patches; implicitly controls resize grid granularity.

Test Plan
Docstring-only change, no functional impact.

vllm.title: [AMD][CI] Support Triton attention with ExampleConnector
vllm.author: rjrock
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
To support Triton attention with ExampleConnector. ROCm uses Triton attention, which has a different kv cache layout than Flash attention, the Cuda default. ExampleConnector currently expects the kv cache layout to match Flash attention.
Test Plan
On ROCm
pytest tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/te
